items.title: Fabregas' Como beat Verona, clinch European spot
items.summary: Cesc Fabregas's Como secured their spot in European football next season with a 1-0 win over Hellas Verona.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Patel, Tattersall show fight as Leicestershire frustrate Sussex
items.summary: Leicestershire inch into slender lead with prospect of setting a challenging fourth-innings target
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: The Browns get to work on Taylen Green's fundamentals
items.summary: A year after the Browns used a fifth-round pick on quarterback Shedeur Sanders, they took a sixth-round flier on quarterback Taylen Green.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
